# JobQual

> TCPA-compliant AI voice agent for recruiting. Outbound screening, resume matching, and ATS sync.

JobQual is an autonomous AI voice agent built for recruiting. It places outbound screening calls, runs custom playbooks, scores candidates in real-time against your rubric, matches resumes to job descriptions via semantic embeddings, and books qualified candidates directly on recruiter calendars — all TCPA-compliant and fully ATS-integrated. Part of GoldenKall LLC.

## Features & Capabilities

- [Home](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com): Product overview, live screening simulator, value proposition.
- [How It Works](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/#how-it-works): Resume → Playbook → Screen → Score → Schedule workflow.
- [Platform Capabilities](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/#features): Outbound & inbound calling, custom screening playbooks, scorecard & knockout gating, semantic resume matching, bulk upload & vendor links, scheduling & reminders, ATS sync (Greenhouse/webhook), warm-transfer handoff.
- [TCPA & Compliance](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/#compliance): DNC list checks, calling-window enforcement, candidate timezone resolution, consent records, disclosure scripting, audit-ready logs.
- [ATS Integrations](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/#integrations): Native Greenhouse connector, generic HMAC webhook, CSV export, ICS calendar invites, SMS & email notifications.
- [Who We Serve](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/#serve-heading): Recruiting agencies, corporate talent acquisition, high-growth startups.
- [Pricing](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/pricing.html): Usage-metered model; contact sales.
- [Compare Tools](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/compare/): Comparisons vs HireFirst, Paradox, Gem, HireVue.
- [Blog & Guides](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/blog/): Articles on phone screening ROI, outbound vs inbound vetting.
- [Glossary](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/glossary/): Terms like outbound call screening.
- [FAQ](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/#faq): Outbound flow, TCPA compliance, resume matching, ATS integrations, vendor submissions, scheduling.
- [Privacy Policy](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/privacy.html): Data practices.
- [Terms of Service](https://jobqual.goldenkall.com/terms.html): Legal terms.

## About

JobQual removes the recruiting bottleneck. Qualified candidates are called within hours, not days. Every screen produces a structured scorecard with fitment score, knockout verdicts, and recruiter-readable summary. Full call transcripts and recordings sync to your ATS automatically. Part of GoldenKall LLC — an agentic AI company.

## App & Support

- App login: https://dash.jobqual.com
- Company: info@jobqual.goldenkall.com
- Parent: [GoldenKall — Agentic AI Company](https://goldenkall.com)
- Sibling product: [Voco — AI Restaurant Phone Ordering](https://voco.goldenkall.com)
